proof: function[T0: Semiring, T1: Semiring](x0: SemiringHom[T0, T1], x1: T0, x2: T0) { semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[T0, T1](x0, x1) = semiring_hom_kernel_quotient_project[T0, T1](x0, x2) = kernel_relation[T0, T1](x0.hom, x1, x2) }[S, T](f, a, b)
